name: Onion and Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Prosciutto (diced) or 4 oz cooked prosciutto
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and cook onions in butter in a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium-low heat for 10 minutes.
2. Stir in parsley, garlic, bay leaves, and prosciutto.
3. Cook, uncovered, over high heat for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except cheese.
5. Heat to boiling.
6. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove bay leaves.
8. Top each serving with cheese.
